name: Gold Banded Staff
description: The Gold Banded Staff, also known as Ruyi Jingu Bang (如意金箍棒), is the magical weapon wielded by Sun Wukong, the Monkey King, in the classic Chinese novel *Journey to the West*. Forged by Taishang Laojun, it was originally a pillar used to measure the depth of the Great Yu's floodwaters. It resides in the Dragon King of the Eastern Sea's treasury before being claimed by Sun Wukong. The staff is immensely heavy, weighing 13,500 catties (approximately 8,100 kg or 17,900 lbs). Its primary ability is its size manipulation; it can shrink to the size of a needle and be hidden in Sun Wukong's ear, or expand to reach the heavens. The gold bands at each end are inscribed with magical spells. The staff is a symbol of Sun Wukong's power, rebellion, and his journey towards enlightenment. It amplifies his strength and allows him to overcome numerous obstacles. The staff is not merely a weapon, but an extension of Sun Wukong's will and character, reflecting his adaptability and unwavering spirit. Throughout the journey, the staff proves crucial in battling demons and protecting Tang Sanzang. Its presence signifies Sun Wukong's mastery over his inherent chaotic nature and his commitment to the pilgrimage. The staff's weight and resilience also symbolizes the burden and perseverance required on the path to spiritual growth. It is a powerful artifact imbued with divine energy and represents the transformative journey of self-discovery and redemption. The staff also possesses the ability to create illusions and is nearly indestructible.
subtitle: Sun Wukong's shape-shifting weapon.
origin: Forged by Taishang Laojun for flood control, later stored in the Dragon King's treasury.
currentLocation: Varies depending on the telling of the story. Sometimes in Sun Wukong's ear, other times in his hands or in the heavens.
associatedDeities: Dragon King of the Eastern Sea

keyMyths.title: Acquisition by Sun Wukong
keyMyths.description: Sun Wukong obtains the staff from the Dragon King after proving his worthiness. He is the only one strong enough to wield it and make it shrink.

keyMyths.title: Use in Battles
keyMyths.description: The staff is used extensively by Sun Wukong in battles against demons and celestial beings. Its size and strength are crucial to his victories.

sources.author: Wu Cheng'en
sources.description: The primary source for the Gold Banded Staff's lore and significance.
sources.text: The primary source for the Gold Banded Staff's lore and significance.
